name: 群星陨落协同
description: 使用圣光手牌时，群星陨落额外攻击
code: function executeSkill(context) { const battle = context.battle; const sourcePiece = context.sourcePiece; if (!sourcePiece) return { success: false }; const tyrande = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.templateId === 'tyrande' && p.faction === sourcePiece.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!tyrande) return { success: false }; const enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.faction !== tyrande.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (enemies.length === 0) return { success: false }; const target = enemies[Math.floor(Math.random() * enemies.length)]; const result = dealDamage(tyrande, target, 3, 'magic', battle, 'starfall-synergy'); const tracker = tyrande.statusTags ? tyrande.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.id === 'starfall-heal-tracker'; }) : null; if (tracker) { tracker.currentUses++; } return { success: true, message: '群星陨落协同：对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害' }; }
